titles.en: Chapter on Defrauding the Unaware Buyer
Chapter on Defrauding the Unaware Buyer

segments: اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "غَبْنُ اَلْمُسْتَرْسِلِ سُحْتٌ وَ غَبْنُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِ حَرَامٌ".
arabic.text: اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "غَبْنُ اَلْمُسْتَرْسِلِ سُحْتٌ وَ غَبْنُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِ حَرَامٌ".

segments: Hadith.3982 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said: "Defrauding the one who entrusts you is unlawful gain, and defrauding a believer is forbidden."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Hadith.3982 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said: "Defrauding the one who entrusts you is unlawful gain, and defrauding a believer is forbidden."

titles.en: Chapter on Defrauding the Unaware Buyer

segments: رِوَايَةِ عَمْرِو بْنِ جُمَيْعٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : "غَبْنُ اَلْمُسْتَرْسِلِ رِبًا ".
arabic.text: رِوَايَةِ عَمْرِو بْنِ جُمَيْعٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : "غَبْنُ اَلْمُسْتَرْسِلِ رِبًا ".

segments:
Hadith.3983 - In a narration from Amr ibn Jameei, from Abu Abdullah (as), he said:
"Defrauding the one who entrusts you is usury."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3983 - In a narration from Amr ibn Jameei, from Abu Abdullah (as), he said:
"Defrauding the one who entrusts you is usury."

narratorChain.raw: وَفِي رِوَايَةِ عَمْرِو بْنِ جُمَيْعٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ ٱلسَّلَامُ قَالَ:

parts.text: َفِي رِوَايَةِ عَمْرِو بْنِ جُمَيْعٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ ٱلسَّلَامُ قَالَ:

titles.en: Chapter on Defrauding the Unaware Buyer

segments: 3984 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "إِذَا قَالَ اَلرَّجُلُ لِلرَّجُلِ هَلُمَّ أَحْسِنْ بَيْعَكَ فَقَدْ حَرُمَ عَلَيْهِ اَلرِّبْحُ ".
arabic.text: 3984 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "إِذَا قَالَ اَلرَّجُلُ لِلرَّجُلِ هَلُمَّ أَحْسِنْ بَيْعَكَ فَقَدْ حَرُمَ عَلَيْهِ اَلرِّبْحُ ".

segments:
Hadith.3984 - Imam (as) said: "If a man says to another man, 'Come, I will improve your sale,' then it is forbidden for him to make a profit."
[REFERENCES]
Al-Kafi, Vol.5 p.152 • Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.272 • Tahdhib Al-Ahkam, Vol.7 p.7 • Al-Wafi, Vol.17 p.457 • Wasa'il Al-Shi'ah, Vol.17 p.395 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.100 p.136
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3984 - Imam (as) said: "If a man says to another man, 'Come, I will improve your sale,' then it is forbidden for him to make a profit."
